appraisal_events.evidence: Il révèle qu’il avait « de [lui]-même, cette idée » et qu’il était « allé demander au capitaine » pour que le narrateur reste; « Sans aucune difficulté. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Robert is presented as considerate and effective: he anticipates the narrator’s desire and easily obtains the captain’s permission, which elevates him locally.

status_effects.explanation: His successful initiative and his consideration for the narrator improve his local estimation.
